programme.desc: Frasier and Niles throw a singles party, where they're both attracted to the same woman. However, before either of them can make a move, Roz steals the show. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, David Hyde Pierce and Peri Gilpin

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of Lela's, a California restaurant that is currently being run into the ground by its inexperienced owner. Gordon tries to turn the failing business around, but faces opposition from the chef and makes enemies when he exposes the suspect behaviour of some members of staff

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to floundering soul food restaurant Blackberry's in Plainfield, New Jersey, but struggles to get his message across to indomitable owner Shelley. Her refusal to deal with the truth comes to a head when Gordon finds a dead mouse in the doorway, prompting him to step up his efforts to change her ways

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman is in south-east Spain helping Victoria and David find their dream holiday home on the Costa Calida, focusing their search around the lively town of Los Alcazares

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: House-hunters Charlotte and Ben are looking to move their young family lock, stock and barrel to the Central American country of Costa Rica. With their £200,000 budget, Ben Hillman shows them five family homes. However, it's a huge life-changing decision, so will any of them be the right fit for the adventurous pair?

programme.title: Travel Man's Greatest Trips
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade recalls some of the finest meals he has enjoyed on his trips. The memories begin with breakfast in Zurich with Frank Skinner, then a perfect macaron in the company of Mel Giedroyc in Paris. In Barcelona, Richard and Kathy Burke took a masterclass in cava and he learned the secrets of chocolate-making in Brussels with Lee Mack. Richard sampled 14 courses of molecular gastronomy with Dawn French in Athens, and in Hong Kong he and Jon Hamm went in search of street food. Along with Paul Rudd, he sampled a local delicacy in Helsinki, and in Russia some space food with Greg Davies and a Soviet-era meal with Rob Beckett

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: More than 60,000 people in Wiltshire have mental health issues, but with support services across the UK being cut it is falling to the emergency services to pick up the pieces. This edition focuses on Wiltshire Police and South West Ambulance call handlers who regularly find themselves counselling people with severe mental health episodes, including one who calls 999 every three seconds claiming he is the archangel Michael

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Fred Sirieix welcomes more singletons, including 23-year-old builder Albert, who meets 25-year-old construction office manager Maria. Retired chef Alan goes on a date with naked bike rider Ian, 21-year-old gamer Ross meets fellow joystick junkie Molly, and former bouncer Shek tries to make his moves on party animal Rio

programme.title: Crime and Punishment
programme.desc: Today in Britain, there are more reports of rape than ever before, but conviction rates are at a record low. The return of the Bafta-nominated documentary following the work of police, prosecution and other law professionals focuses on the challenges of investigating this complex and devastating crime. The programme follows two cases as they move through the system, from the perspective of the police and the Crown Prosecution Service as well as the accounts of the alleged victims

programme.title: Lose a Stone in 21 Days with Michael Mosley
programme.desc: Doctor and dietician Michael Mosley puts five volunteers on a low-calorie diet to help get their health back on track after the UK's Covid-19 lockdown. It is week two of their very low-calorie diet and the volunteers' tempers are beginning to fray, but Michael gets them doing high-intensity work-outs and yoga. He also explores the connection between obesity and inflammation and the role it is thought to have in almost every major disease and illness, and Michael's wife, author Dr Clare Bailey, shares recipes and food tips that help to build and maintain muscle

programme.title: How to Beat
programme.desc: Kate Quilton and Dr Javid Abdelmoneim enlist nine volunteers from around the UK to take part in a six-week experiment to see what simple techniques can help treat chronic pain. The programme tries out various methods including yoga, tai chi, acupuncture or cold-water swimming, and question how much of the experience of pain is psychological. The programme also features the story of a woman who is unable to feel pain due to a genetic mutation, who may hold the key to the future treatment of chronic pain

programme.title: The Yorkshire Jobcentre
programme.desc: Behind the scenes at a busy public employment service, revealing what life is like for those living on welfare and how the dedicated team of job coaches help customers. The first edition features 61-year-old former account worker Karen, who is struggling to compete in today's job market today, while Kenny, 32, is seen by work coach Bernie to try to get him back on his feet, and ex-cleaner and grandmother Pamela Anderson is struggling to find the time to search for a job

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Sarah from Wiltshire looks for a three-bedroom house in Bulgaria that falls within her budget of £40,000, and Jonnie Irwin finds five properties for her to choose from

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Katharine and Rory offer some proper Yorkshire hospitality at Chapter Two Accommodation in Malton, including an afternoon of sausage-making and a belly-busting breakfast

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: DJ Kevin hosts the first of a week of dinner parties in and around Swansea, hoping to win his guests over with an evening inspired by his favourite holiday destination of Benidorm

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: This week's competition is in and around Swansea, where second host, café bar owner Tino, is hoping to wow her guests with an African banquet inspired by her homeland of Zimbabwe

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: For the third visit of the week in Swansea, beautician Natalie hopes to impress her guests with a George Michael-themed evening

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Bodybuilder Rob hopes his Thai-themed menu will impress the guests in Swansea, but his starter lacks a vital component and his main is incredibly similar to the previous course

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Swansea, GP and keen tennis player Janine hopes to serve up an ace with a tennis-themed evening. The night kicks off with everyone dressed up for Centre Court - and bodybuilder Rob turning up in a mini skirt. Benidorm-loving DJ Kev is overcome with emotion as he tells the gang that this is the best week of his life, while cafe bar owner Tino decides to pick fault with Janine's dishes instead

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman is in south-east Spain helping Victoria and David find their dream holiday home on the Costa Calida, focusing their search around the lively town of Los Alcazares

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Glenda and Tina from Dorset are looking for the perfect holiday home in Portugal's western Algarve. These nature-loving culture vultures are looking for somewhere where they can spend time walking their dog Lady and enjoying the rich local history. Jasmine Harman shows them five properties for their £100,000 budget

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time, and Causilgey Manor owners Robin and Brenda want to get to grips with Julie and Jason's gripes over privacy

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: Ruth from Colchester, Essex, wants to move to Spain to give her and her son Hayden a better quality of life. As well as finding a home for themselves with a maximum budget of 225,000 euros, Ruth is after somewhere that could provide extra income too. Sharon and Steve come up with three unusual properties, including one that features a separate restaurant, sports hall, and 200-seater amphitheatre. The Rodriguez family helps retired hairdresser Janet, who brings along her cousin Sheila to help find her ideal Spanish getaway on a budget of 70,000 euros

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A broken Swiss watch, car trouble, a birthday surprise and a party thrown by Niles's latest lover all combine to ruin Frasier's chances of romance with an attractive new acquaintance. With Kelsey Grammer and Lisa Waltz

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The radio psychiatrist is outraged when Kenny orders him to read adverts for a new sponsor on air, and rallies his fellow presenters to stage a protest. Kelsey Grammer stars

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef tries to transform the fortunes of Sebastian's, a pizzeria in Burbank, Los Angeles, which is failing to attract customers, leaving the owner in debt and struggling to support his family. Gordon is horrified to discover pre-processed and frozen ingredients on the menu, but there seems to be little he can do to help when he is thrown out of the kitchen

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is in New Jersey to help Rose Leone, who spent two years in a coma and came out of hospital to learn her son Michael had run her once-thriving Italian restaurant into the ground. With a menu of more than 126 dishes, the quality of the food is suffering, and even the chefs refuse to eat their own creations

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Sarah from Wiltshire looks for a three-bedroom house in Bulgaria that falls within her budget of £40,000, and Jonnie Irwin finds five properties for her to choose from

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman helps childhood sweethearts Michelle and Fred find their dream holiday home on Gran Canaria. Michelle and Fred fell in love with the island after holidaying there over 20 years ago, and now the time is right to use their £190,000 budget to find somewhere where they can bring Michelle's mother and their three grandsons to enjoy too

programme.title: Phil Spencer's Stately Homes
programme.desc: The property expert visits Hampton Court Palace just outside London, most famous as King Henry VIII's home. After 500 years of royal rebuilding, is is now a fusion of styles. With special access to both spectacular and secret spaces, Phil unpicks the story of how the palace was built and how much it cost

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Maureen, who's 66, is rushed to St George's struggling to breathe through her tracheostomy. Nurse Christine battles to clear her airway, while Maureen's husband Preston waits in the relatives' room. As doctors carry out further investigations, Preston joins Maureen and it's revealed how their world was turned upside down when Maureen was diagnosed with the neurological condition multiple system atrophy. Ten-year-old Ryan is brought into resus having fallen at school and suffered internal bleeding

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon travels to the heart of Los Angeles, California, to save the Brownstone Bistro, a Caribbean fusion restaurant. The chef and his team have just 24 hours to renovate the premises with a vibrant look, create more space in the cramped kitchen and introduce a simplified menu featuring fresh and authentic Caribbean fare, working around the clock to teach the staff how to cook the dishes

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Sean Lock and Daisy May Cooper take on guest team captain Richard Ayoade and Ivo Graham. Adam Buxton is in Dictionary Corner with Susie Dent, and Joe Wilkinson joins Rachel Riley at the numbers board

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jon Richardson and Tom Allen take on Sean Lock and Rosie Jones in the classic words and numbers quiz, while Sean Bean - aka Adam Riches - joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner. Hosted by Jimmy Carr, with Rachel Riley looking after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Travel Man's Greatest Trips
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade continues to delve into the Travel Man archive with a look at highlights themed around arts and crafts. Featured are a drawing tour of Amsterdam's Rijksmuseum with Joe Lycett and a visit of New York's smallest museum, The Mmuseumm, with Katherine Ryan. Also, Richard and Morgana Robinson discuss their final dining choices stood before Da Vinci's Last Supper in Milan, and the street art of Athens and Paris is appreciated by Dawn French and Mel Giedroyc respectively

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: Make Do and Mend
programme.desc: Dick and Angel Strawbridge help Xuxa and Simon, who are keen to transform the Second World War air raid shelter in their garden into a craft room - the only problem is, the space is tiny, so Angel thinks up some creative space-saving solutions. They also get requests to help Lyra and her dad James, who want to make a new chicken coop, and Helena, whose 1960s stereogram record player is no longer spinning

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Scarlette Douglas is house hunting Torremolinos on the Costa Del Sol with Chris and Jacqueline from Lancashire, finding five properties within their £150,000 budget

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they've been paid and to settle some scores. Tanya defends the lack of breakfast offering at Greenview Guesthouse and is left flabbergasted when the payments are revealed

programme.desc: Will's ex-boyfriend Michael returns, giving the impression that he wants to pick up where they left off. Karen takes stock of her position at Grace Adler Designs and decides she needs more responsibility

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Stan suffers a heart attack, so Will rushes to visit him at the hospital, where he and the rest of the gang take bets on who Karen will turn to in her hour of need - little realising she knows about their wager. Comedy, starring Eric McCormack and Megan Mullally

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack mistakenly donates a pair of Karen's favourite shoes to a good cause. Meanwhile, Grace volunteers to help direct an amateur play with Will - a task she pursues with zeal until her social life begins to suffer. American sitcom, starring Eric McCormack

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Part one of two. Michael is buzzing with excitement when he heads off to a basketball camp with his all-time sporting hero Michael Jordan

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Part two of two. Michael resorts to some inventive ploys to ensure he is able to still play against his idol. Guest starring Michael Jordan

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: People featured in previous episodes, including an Essex landlady who wondered why her tenant had stopped paying rent - only to discover that the woman was in prison for GBH and that her ex-boyfriend had moved into the flat. Plus, a music entrepreneur who took his tenant to court after receiving no rent for seven months

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Documentary using eyewitness testimony and footage from camcorders, CCTV and phones to examine the experiences of people who have become involved in disputes with neighbours. Posters aimed at naming and shaming one of the residents of Withycombe, Somerset, for taking part in a government-backed badger cull result in him and his family being driven out by animal rights activists. In Woodford Green, north-east London, an ambitious house extension results in all light being blocked to one neighbouring property and huge cracks appearing in the other, while a Bournemouth woman ends up having a restraining order taken out against her after erecting a gated driveway before receiving official approval

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Paul Bohill and Phil Short must deal with a negligent tenant who fled upon their arrival, forcing the agents to set a trap in order to evict him. Brian O'Shaughnessy and Kevin Stokes chase a debt of £5,000 in Kent, before heading to Surrey to recover £11,000 owed by the owner a bespoke furniture business. Plus, Paul and Steve Pinner's patience is tested to the limit when they are sent to carry out an eviction in London

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Stewart McCracken and Elmore Victor head to Liverpool for what they expect to be a routine repossession, but instead face the most challenging eviction of their careers. Behind the front door, they find a critically ill two-year-old child with major heart problems, who is on constant life support and unable to breathe without a ventilator. Meanwhile, Brian O'Shaughnessy and Del Anglin chase £2,000 worth of debt owed by a business based in Kent, and recover £4,000 from a recycling business in Buckinghamshire. Plus, Stewart and Elmore encounter another family in crisis in Birmingham, where a retired couple who acted as guarantor for their daughter's tenancy are liable to pay over £3,000 after she defaulted

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Delroy and Kevin face a web of deceit in an Italian delicatessen in south London as they chase a huge debt amounting to £29,000. Meanwhile, Steve and Paul must evict a tenant in north London who has not paid her rent for over 18 months, before heading to Cambridgeshire to make one of their most emotional evictions to date. Plus, Brian and Delroy track down a pensioner in Surrey who owes £15,000 for a business he bought four years ago

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The enforcement agents try to mediate a dispute in a takeaway, and deal with rent evaders living in potentially deadly conditions. Plus, a businessman faces financial ruin

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Liam and police dog Titan take part in a full-scale manhunt, while Paul takes two drug dealers by surprise, and a man needs to be rescued from the River Wear. In Darlington, Damo finds a man unconscious after a punch-up and a suspicious driver tries to outfox the interceptors

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Rookie team member Rachael faces a baptism of fire on a night shift, from a face-off with a driver threatening her colleague Lee's family, to the pursuit of a high-speed Mercedes carrying with a pregnant passenger. Elsewhere, Liam plays a pitch-black game of hunt the knife in the aftermath of a terrifying armed robbery, dog handler Mo deals with a double fire before arresting a man who appears to be stealing from a phone box, and a motorist picks up the phone and calls the police to report interceptor Chris for stealing his car

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Nicolette is stunned that her mother, Jane, is on her way to Erinsborough, while David has agreed to Aaron's idea of having Brent stay with them

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: John and Marilyn have an honest conversation about their marriage, Grace's past shocks Irene, and Tori gets agitated when Jasmine and Grace are the faces of the new gym classes

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Nick Wallis examines how CCTV and helicopter cameras mean wrongdoers can no longer hide in a crowd. He highlights the use of such footage to help seal the conviction of a man involved in the August 2011 riots across England, and reports on a state-of-the-art network monitoring a football crowd of 21,000 as Leicester City take on Barnsley

programme.title: Robbing Your Relatives
programme.desc: The case of a man who repeatedly lied and stole from the woman he claimed to love, racking up thousands of pounds of debt by stealing her credit cards and inventing a fantasy life. This episode also examines the case of a family member who allegedly conned an elderly relative out of her life savings

programme.title: Psycho Pussies 2: Mad Cat Attacks!
programme.desc: Online clips and live case studies explore some bad feline behaviour, including those fearlessly ferocious types that think nothing of attacking their loyal owners. Owner Cath found herself hospitalised for four days after her savage cat Milo attacked her, while Deezel's owner Fiona has had to build an impenetrable wall to prevent the feline attacking three dogs. Elsewhere, aptly-named Sid Vicious is a feral punk rocker of a cat who eats six times a day. Will owner Janice ever be able to tame this animal with an attitude?

programme.title: Wentworth Prison
programme.desc: Facing prosecution for the siege and a life behind bars following the Attorney General's suicide, an embittered Marie makes a desperate, last-ditch attempt to avenge her son

FBI agent Clarice Starling is once again drawn into the doctor's deadly orbit as she finds herself being used as bait for the avenger's trap. Ridley Scott's thriller sequel, starring Anthony Hopkins, Julianne Moore, Gary Oldman and Ray Liotta

programme.desc: The debt collection agents grapple with emotional evictions and moral dilemmas during the festive period, including a young family in Crystal Palace who are made homeless when the landlord repossesses their home because he wants to redevelop the property. The eviction comes as a shock to the family as they are up to date with their rent, but have just one hour to gather their belongings. Plus, an acrimonious divorce in Chessington comes to a head when the estranged wife obtains a writ to reclaim the house, and an off-licence owner in Hampshire with unpaid rent of more than £5,000 battles to keep his business open just as everything shuts down for the holidays

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

Plus, Stewart and Iain face an eviction that is set to test their patience

programme.desc: Two more families swap places for a week, getting a taste of one another's lives in rural Essex and inner-city London. How will both families find their new living arrangements - and the accompanying budgets?

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Junior is deceived into thinking his baby brother has magical powers that will increase the knowledge of anyone who holds him

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Jay annoys Michael by attending the poker game he had arranged for men only, but he gets his own back by going to her book group

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: The De Ropers' hopes of a peaceful life in Yeovil, Somerset, were rudely shattered by their neighbour Peter Stoodley's 120 noisy chickens, and they spent their first two years in their new home battling to persuade the authorities to ban him from keeping animals. In a quiet Anglesey village, 67-year-old Pamela Booth's discovered that her neighbour had been fraudulently using her bank card to steal more than £1,000 over 10 months, while a 24-year-old wannabe rapper in Dagenham, east London, generated more than 80 complaints after repeatedly keeping residents awake by playing loud music into the early hours in his flat

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Close friends Janet Perrie and Fiona Hope moved to the South Ayrshire village of Dipple in search of an idyllic new life for themselves and their 22 dogs. Unfortunately for them, other residents were enraged by the noise, smell and mess and wasted no time in contacting the authorities. In a cul-de-sac in Leicestershire, the Pollard, Walne and Elliott families have been harassed by 68-year-old Leslie Collins for more than a decade after they complained about the noise from an illegal wood-waste business he was running from his home. He then began to target them with increasingly intimidating behaviour - including mooning, two-finger salutes, shouting abuse, cutting holes in hedges and spying on them with binoculars

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Stewart and Iain head to Manchester, where a landlord is owed £8,000 in rent arrears and has already called for police back-up. As tempers rise, the pair must find a way to handle a situation that is spiralling dangerously out of control. Meanwhile, Brian and Del chase £3,000 owed to a firm of letting agents, before tracking a debtor who was accidentally over-paid for a job. Plus, Stewart and Iain face an eviction that is set to test their patience

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Paul and Ben face a challenging eviction in London, where a vulnerable tenant in rent arrears has barricaded her front door, and the agents receive a tirade of abuse. Meanwhile, Brian and Del chase a debt of nearly £2,000 in Surrey, before trying to recover almost £3,000 in Northamptonshire. Finally, Steve and Ru head to Portsmouth to evict a young family for a landlord who wants her property back

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court Enforcement Agents Paul and Steve are sent to north London to evict a young Romanian mother who owes £6,000 in unpaid rent, but when they arrive, they discover a family home that is not quite what it appears to be. Meanwhile, in Kent, Brian and Alan turn up the pressure on a debtor who has admitted to owing more than £7,000, but claims he cannot afford to pay up - despite having a garage full of expensive tools. Later, in south-west London, Brian accompanies Delroy as he tries to recover a £400,000 debt from a residential property, and when the pair trace the defaulter to an upmarket cafe, the man in charge lies about his identity

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Jacko and the firearms team are called to house where a suspect is reported as possessing a shotgun, while Richie and Pete hunt down a driver who escaped on foot after crashing his car while under the influence of drugs. Dog handler Liam and his canine colleague Louie are part of a 20-strong team raiding two houses linked to a suspected drug dealer

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: AJ and Richie are in pursuit of a van speeding through narrow country lanes, while Jacko and the team box in a van carrying large quantities of cannabis. Plus, sparks fly when dog handler Justin and police dog Elsa capture two burglars on a building site

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Pierce is hurt by how little his opinion seems to matter to Chloe, while Sheila tries to convince Clive to let her move in with him and give Levi the run of her house

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Jasmine lashes out at Colby, Irene and Willow and becomes aggressive and reckless. Bella and Nikau's happiness grows, but Colby warns her about the relationship

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Kate faces trouble from unruly tenants, who became anti-social, and are now trying to sue her for serving them an eviction notice. Dhiren relates how the existing tenant of a house he bought stopped paying rent as soon as he took ownership, and Tim explains how a health scare left him seeking to sell his property - but a standing occupant refused to leave

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Documentary using eyewitness testimony and footage from camcorders, CCTV and phones to examine traumatic, shocking, humorous and occasionally bizarre experiences of people who have become involved in disputes with neighbours. The programme also reveals how long-fought battles result in Asbos, evictions and sometimes violence

A serious accident compounds his misfortunes and jeopardises his chances of ever racing again. Drama, starring Tom Cruise, Nicole Kidman, Robert Duvall, Randy Quaid and John C Reilly

programme.desc: Assistant DAs McCoy and Kincaid put their careers on the line in search of the truth behind the death of a wealthy woman. Meanwhile, detectives question the victim's first and second husbands, and her teenage daughter

programme.desc: A routine investigation brings to light evidence that prompts Briscoe and Logan to pick up the trail of a political fugitive who went underground following a 1971 burglary that left a police officer dead. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A policeman's past comes back to haunt him when his wife alleges he raped her. As inquiries into the case deepen, a history of violence is exposed. Hard-hitting drama, guest starring Nestor Serrano and Amy Carlson, with Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.desc: The team travels to Cimarron, New Mexico, to visit its allegedly haunted St James Hotel, whose former guests have included Jesse James, Wyatt Earp and Annie Oakley

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Part two of three. Yvette Fielding and the team of paranormal investigators conclude their visit to Shrewsbury Prison, examining the condemned cell and execution room

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Only seven pounds separates antiques experts James Braxton and Raj Bisram as they set off in Cheshire heading to their final auction in Somerset. On their journey, Raj hears why a group of daredevil playboys decided to drive their car in to the Savoy to join them for dinner and James learns why a pint in the Crown and Anchor pub played a vital role in verifying the quality of silver in 1773

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Experts Anita Manning and Raj Bisram set out on a road trip through East Anglia to seek out items to sell at an auction in Besston, Norfolk

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Eggheads Barry Simmons and Lisa Thiel embark on the cross-country treasure-hunting challenge around Lancashire, Yorkshire and Merseyside, joined by expert assistants Paul Laidlaw and Christina Trevanion

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping Feature. Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise is your greatest one

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Developers Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts explore an old Methodist chapel in Stanley Village, Derbyshire, a two-bedroom mid-terraced house in Bacup, Lancashire, and a garden flat in London, before finding out what they were sold for at auction

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: With retirement on the horizon, Eve and Vinden Grace are looking for a place that they can use for holidays for now, but where they will eventually live half the year. The Gulf Coast of Florida has the perfect blend of lifestyle, culture and climate. Laura Hamilton shows them five homes for their £100,000 budget in and around Clearwater

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Anita Manning starts this leg negotiating hard in an attempt to catch Raj Bisram's early lead. They shop in Norfolk before heading for an auction in Stansted Mountfitchet, Essex

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts Anita Manning and Raj Bisram head to Suffolk, Kent and Surrey to search for treasures, before returning to Essex for their third auction

programme.title: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: Jay Blades visits Altrincham Recycling Centre in search of three items of tip-bound trash that he can rework and repurpose to reveal their true potential. With three curious items saved, Jay enlists two specialist makers to turn trash into cash. Designer Daniel Heath gives a garden chiminea a radical redesign, and upcycler Sarah Peterson gives a shabby set of curtains a style overhaul. But will their transformations be able to make some money for nothing?

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Drew Pritchard visits the Wirral, where he tours a stately home that doubles as an antique shop, and finds so much worth buying that he worries his finances might be in trouble

programme.title: Animal Cops Houston
programme.desc: Debbie Michaelson discovers newborn puppies hidden in a disused shed, and the SPCA rescues 60 cats from a decaying house

programme.title: Animal Cops Houston
programme.desc: An investigator tries to rescue an emaciated cat that is trapped in an empty house, while Debbie encounters a pack of feral dogs and a grieving widow's pot-bellied pig

programme.title: Saving Lives at Sea
programme.desc: In south west Wales, the Tenby lifeboat crew races to a kayaker with suspected back and neck injuries after being caught out by a freak wave. Neighbouring Cornish crews must join forces in an epic 11-hour battle to stop a 3,600-ton trading vessel breaking up on the rocks. And the Dart and Salcombe crews are astonished to be paged to the biggest shout of their lives

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's Renovate Don't Relocate
programme.desc: The property expert visits 20 homes, and using monitoring cameras and life-size floor plans she creates new layouts and design ideas that mean families do not have to move house

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Anita Manning has high hopes for an Eastern deity figure she finds as she and Raj Bisram go shopping in the Kent towns of Deal, Sandwich and Faversham

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. The series is centred around the roads of Auckland, the country's largest urban area, and features motoring chaos including major traffic collisions, escaped animals and pedestrians on busy roads. There is also footage of drivers falling asleep at the wheel, overloaded vehicles and suspects caught with illegal substances - plus a host of excuses as the people pulled over try to persuade officers they have not done anything wrong

programme.desc: Immigration officials are worried about the mental health of a Korean girl who arrives at Sydney Airport with very little money and no idea of how she will support herself

programme.title: Border Security: America's Front Line
programme.desc: Reality series charting the work of US Customs and Border Protection agents, responsible for acting as the first line of defence for air, sea and land entry-points to the US

programme.title: Border Security: America's Front Line
programme.desc: Reality series charting the work of US Customs and Border Protection agents, responsible for acting as the first line of defence for air, sea and land entry-points to the US

programme.title: Neighbourhood Blues
programme.desc: The neighbourhood policing team cracks down on Humberside drug dens and tackles teenage drinking. Plus, officers go after a motorcycle menace on the run. Presented by Rav Wilding

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The new head of the cartography section, Commander Nella Darren, attracts an admirer in Captain Picard, who then has to send her on a risky mission. Sci-fi adventure, starring Patrick Stewart and Wendy Hughes

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: Melinda discovers the spirits of three boys and a dog while cleaning out an old inn basement. She learns they were killed in an orphanage fire 50 years earlier and are trapped in the building, now due for demolition - prompting her to help them cross over before they become earthbound for ever

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: Flynn lends a hand to help the team find the hidden treasure of the dragons, who may otherwise awake and cause havoc. Fantasy adventure spin-off from the Librarian films, starring John Larroquette, Rebecca Romijn, Christian Kane, Lindy Booth and John Kim

programme.title: War on Britain's Roads
programme.desc: Documentary offering an insight into the daily conflict between the 34 million motorists and 12 million cyclists as they compete for the same crowded space on the UK's roads. Cycle helmet cameras provide a close-up view of the unfolding tension and conflict as everyday incidents get out of hand, collisions take place and police on bikes chase down errant road-users. In addition to the footage, a mother who lost her cyclist daughter talks about what she did to change safety on the roads and a cab driver reveals how his own loss altered his opinion of bike-riders for ever

programme.title: The Force: North East
programme.desc: A trail of blood leaves officers puzzled, a man high on drink and drugs launches a tirade of abuse and a domestic fight leads to an arrest

programme.title: The Force: North East
programme.desc: Police hunt for a man wanted for domestic violence, while a tip-off leads to a drugs raid and an uninsured driver gives officers the runaround

programme.title: Brit Cops
programme.desc: Documentary series which follows a rapid response team of police officers as they tackle crime

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: Dog handler Steve and his German shepherd are called on to assist officers in Exeter, where police have sprayed a youth with CS gas. The Tactical Aid Group launches a drug raid and road crime unit officer Mike is unimpressed by the string of excuses he receives from an uninsured motorist. Plus, footage of sledgehammer-wielding jewellery thieves in America

programme.title: Banged Up Abroad
programme.desc: The story of single mother-of-three Ruthie Lambert, who turned to drug trafficking to raise much-needed cash for her mortgage payments. She made numerous successful trips smuggling cocaine out of Peru, until she was finally caught and locked up in a tough South American prison. Ruth discovered she had incurable cancer, and fled the country in a desperate attempt to see her family

programme.title: Police Force: Australia
programme.desc: Documentary series following the work of police forces across Australia as they deal with situations from sieges and major drug busts, to murder investigations

programme.title: Police Force: Australia
programme.desc: Documentary series following the work of police forces across Australia as they deal with situations from sieges and major drug busts, to murder investigations

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. The series is centred around the roads of Auckland, the country's largest urban area, and features motoring chaos including major traffic collisions, escaped animals and pedestrians on busy roads. There is also footage of drivers falling asleep at the wheel, overloaded vehicles and suspects caught with illegal substances - plus a host of excuses as the people pulled over try to persuade officers they have not done anything wrong

programme.desc: Michael Mosley and the team are in Lancaster to find out how much air pollution a typical family breathes in and whether trees could be the answer to the problem. programme.desc: A criminal murders an aristocrat, planning to assume his identity - but is disappointed to discover the man he has replaced is heavily in debt. Horror based on Wilkie Collins' The Woman in White, starring Tod Slaughter and Sylvia Marriott

programme.title: Our Queen
programme.desc: Feature-length documentary filmed throughout 2012, providing an in-depth portrait of Elizabeth II during her Diamond Jubilee year. Prince Charles and other members of the royal family share their stories, providing insights into the Queen's life over an important and busy 12 months filled with celebrations. The programme also reveals what really happens when the prime minister sits down with the monarch, and the lid is lifted on that memorable 007 moment at the London Olympic Games opening ceremony

Drama, starring Letitia Wright, Shirley Henderson and Ian Hart

The programme also reveals what really happens when the prime minister sits down with the monarch, and the lid is lifted on that memorable 007 moment at the London Olympic Games opening ceremony

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Andrew White walks from Banavie to Gairlocky and around the Ribblehead Viaduct

programme.title: Mantovani TV Specials
programme.desc: Mantovani's 1950s TV series featuring special guests and hits of the time played by Mantovani and his Orchestra

programme.title: The Rats of Tobruk (1944)
programme.desc: Two tough Australian soldiers fight alongside an intellectual Englishman in the North African campaign. They become involved in a critical siege, and their fearless efforts manage to hold up the German advance for months. Second World War drama, starring Grant Taylor, Peter Finch and Chips Rafferty

programme.title: Portrait from Life (1949)
programme.desc: A British army officer searches for a Jewish refugee in post-war Germany, only to discover that she has lost her memory. Romantic mystery, starring Robert Beatty and Mai Zetterling

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Featuring inspirational walks from around Britain

programme.title: Property Ladder
programme.desc: Sarah Beeny meets a Tonbridge family who have resigned themselves to life on a building site as they attempt to modernise and extend their three-bedroom bungalow in the hope of moving up the property ladder

programme.title: Our Queen
programme.desc: Feature-length documentary filmed throughout 2012, providing an in-depth portrait of Elizabeth II during her Diamond Jubilee year. Prince Charles and other members of the royal family share their stories, providing insights into the Queen's life over an important and busy 12 months filled with celebrations. The programme also reveals what really happens when the prime minister sits down with the monarch, and the lid is lifted on that memorable 007 moment at the London Olympic Games opening ceremony

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sharon spreads her wings and takes full advantage of her sister's hospitality, but Tracey is having money worries. Ross Kemp guest stars, with Linda Robson and Pauline Quirke

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Tracey makes an appointment with a Harley Street specialist, hoping to allay her suspicions that she may be pregnant. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: The Moodys
programme.desc: The comedy series concludes with a wedding, but who's getting married? As the day descends into chaos, it seems increasingly likely that nobody will make it down the aisle. Starring Ian Meadows, Patrick Brammall, Jane Harber, Phil Lloyd and Rachel Gordon

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing lesser known areas of London for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: Brimstone and Treacle (1982)
programme.desc: Asinister stranger worms his way into a middle-aged couple's home by offering to take care of their comatose daughter - but it is only once he's part of the family that his true nature shines through. Drama based on Dennis Potter's TV play, starring Sting, Denholm Elliott, Joan Plowright and Suzanna Hamilton

programme.title: The Escort (2015)
programme.desc: A sex-obsessed journalist whose career is falling apart has a chance encounter in a bar with a high-class prostitute. Seeing a chance to write the story that will make him a success, he persuades her to let him document her life, and a strange connection develops between the two lonely outsiders. Comedy drama, starring Michael Doneger, Lyndsy Fonseca and Bruce Campbell

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: The travellers arrive in Linz, Austria, where they take a cruise down the Danube and Phil settles his quarrel with Pasquale in an unusual way. Meanwhile, tempers fray among the younger tourists

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: The tourists arrive in Austria's capital, Vienna, and play a game of animal charades, followed by a trip to the world's oldest zoo. During lunch, Emma lends the chef a helping hand and the group later unites for a spin on the big wheel

programme.title: Obsessed with My Body
programme.desc: With British boys now apparently spending 30 per cent more time in the bathroom than teenage girls and taking twice as many selfies, this documentary follows some of those in search of the perfect body. From bodybuilding and eyebrow waxing to make-up, the film also examines how far they will they go to achieve perfection. And what happens when things are taken to extremes?
